description: Read-cap measurement basis per surface. Closes FGAP-016 (P3): for --json measure the EMITTED compact form (so the cap reflects what actually ships), for text/Pi-tool keep measuring the pretty form (what the agent reads); surface the firing dimension (bytes vs lines) in the REFUSAL message. Cross-channel: the truncate.ts cap primitive + ops-registry.ts boundedJsonOutput (:198), overCapRefusalText (:163), and renderOpResultText (:177) — cli.ts imports (:37) and calls (:1135) them — + read-element.ts structureForRead/renderReadText.
acceptance_criteria: FGAP-016 closed: a value whose compact --json form fits under the cap but whose pretty form exceeds it is no longer over-refused under --json
The refusal message states whether the bytes or the 2000-line dimension fired
No leak: the cap still fails closed
notes: Release-group: read-cap-measurement (R+2) | order 8 | addresses FGAP-016 | standalone P3, cross-channel
